zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern於大約1079年出生在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素時，她的父親Osbern le Scrope35歲，母親Nest ferch Gruffudd21歲。她和Bernard of Neufmarché至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1121年在威爾士布雷康史爾布雷孔享年43歲，埋葬在威爾士布雷康史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern于大约1079年出生在英国賀福爾理查茲 卡素时，她的父亲Osbern le Scrope35岁，母亲Nest ferch Gruffudd21岁。她和Bernard of Neufmarché至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1121年在威尔士布雷康史爾布雷孔享年43岁，埋葬在威尔士布雷康史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: aka
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Nesta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern was born about 1079, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, her father, Osbern le Scrope, was 35 and her mother, Nest ferch Gruffudd, was 21. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Bernard of Neufmarché. She died in 1121, in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales, at the age of 43, and was buried in Breconshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern est née environ 1079, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Osbern le Scrope, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Nest ferch Gruffudd, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Bernard of Neufmarché. Elle est décédée en 1121, à Brecon, Breconshire, Galles, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Breconshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern um 1079 in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Osbern le Scrope 35 und ihre Mutter Nest ferch Gruffudd 21. Sie hatte mit Bernard of Neufmarché mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1121 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales und wurde in Breconshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern è nata il circa 1079 nel Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Osbern le Scrope, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Nest ferch Gruffudd, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Bernard of Neufmarché. Morì nel 1121, nel Brecon, Breconshire, Galles, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Breconshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbernが約1079年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルで生まれた時，父Osbern le Scropeは35歳，母Nest ferch Gruffuddは21歳であった。彼女はBernard of Neufmarchéとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1121年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアブレコンで43歳で死去し，ウェールズブレコンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern(이)가 대략 1079년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Osbern le Scrope(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nest ferch Gruffudd(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Bernard of Neufmarché(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1121년 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 브레콘실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern nasceu aproximadamente 1079, em Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Osbern le Scrope, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Nest ferch Gruffudd, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Bernard of Neufmarché. Ela faleceu em 1121, em Brecon, Breconshire, Gales, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Breconshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern родилась около 1079 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Osbern le Scrope было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Nest ferch Gruffudd, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Bernard of Neufmarché. Она умерла в 1121 г. в местности брекон, брекуншир, Уэльс в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности брекуншир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern nació aproximadamente 1079, en Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Osbern le Scrope, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Nest ferch Gruffudd, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Bernard of Neufmarché. Murió en 1121, en Brecon, Breconshire, Gales, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Breconshire, Gales.
